'''Namra''' was the second-largest [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] of the [[Bacrana system/Legends|system]]. A [[Color/Legends|yellow]] and orange [[Planet/Legends|planet]], Namra had ten [[Moon/Legends|moons]], four of which were [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]]. The remaining moons were relatively the same size and composition, with thin [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheres]] and a cratered coating of [[Water/Legends|ice]].<ref name="FBS" />
